items.name: ckpt dedup (xxhash chunk-level)
items.scope: checkpoints/ (333 MiB current, projected ~50 GiB at H100 LoRA-saturation)
items.rationale: base 14B ckpt chunks identical across LoRA/QLoRA derivatives; xxh128 64MiB chunks → CAS dedup. At 4-8 LoRA derivatives per base, dedup ratio ~30-40%.

items.name: R2 lifecycle (auto-archive ckpt >30d)
items.rationale: 60% of ckpt objects exceed 30d; IA tier ~50% storage cost discount → ~30% monthly bill reduction. Multipart abort + scratch expire reclaim incidental.

items.name: tar.zst level 22 vs 19 corpus shard recompress
items.rationale: tiny mock shard sampled in smoke; cc100/kowiki text corpora typically yield 5-15% additional shrinkage at -22 --ultra --long=27 vs -19. Conservative midpoint 8%.

items.name: artifact GC (orphan cert/state cleanup)
items.rationale: scans .roadmap (uchg, read-only) + .meta2-cert/index.json as reference universe; basename substring match. --apply mode does QUARANTINE MOVE only — never deletes. Per ROI hard-constraint.

items.name: log rotation (zstd, weekly)
items.rationale: log files compress ~9× at zstd -19; sha256 roundtrip-verified before original removal.

totals.estimated_total_saving_human: ~18.4 GiB once H100 ckpt scale + corpus recompress applied; ~1.6 MiB immediate from log rotation
